zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Appollonia Hanss於1615年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲皮爾馬森斯文斯格時，她的父親Nicolaus Hanss30歲，母親Anna Katharina Speck30歲。她於1644年1月8日與Johannes Georg Hüther在可特格希 貝也茨魏布呂肯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1709年8月18日在德國貝也普法爾茲享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Appollonia Hanss于1615年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲皮爾馬森斯文斯格时，她的父亲Nicolaus Hanss30岁，母亲Anna Katharina Speck30岁。她于1644年1月8日与Johannes Georg Hüther在可特格希 貝也茨魏布呂肯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1709年8月18日在德国貝也普法爾茲享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hanss
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hanke, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In England this personal name was a shortened form of both Hankin and Hancock , both of which were used as pet forms of Henry . The equivalent Middle Dutch names Hanke and Hankin, however, had the sense ‘young John’ and may have been introduced to England by Flemish settlers after the Conquest. There is no evidence to support the suggestion that an English hereditary surname was formed from the Old Norse personal name Anki, a diminutive of personal names such as Arngrim and Arnketill.

variants.name: Hankes
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): metronymic from the Yiddish female personal name Khanke (a pet form of Khane, from Hebrew Ḥanna; see Hanna 6), with the Yiddish possessive suffix -s.

variants.name: Hankin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Yaron, Abbe, Isadore, Myer, Yitzhak.

English: from the Middle English personal name Hankin, a pet form of Hann , which in English usage was usually a short form of Hanry (Henry), and occasionally perhaps a rhyming pet form of Randal (Randolph). In Middle Dutch, Hankin was a pet form of Johan (John), a usage which may have been brought to England by Flemings after the Norman Conquest, but no examples have yet been found in Middle English where a man named John was also called Hankin. Compare Henkin , Hanks , and Hancock .
English: from Middle English Handekin, a pet form of the personal name Hand, Hond (see Hand ).

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Appollonia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of the Greek masculine name Apollonios, an adjectival derivative of the name of the sun god, Apollo. This is of uncertain origin, and may be pre-Greek. St Apollonia was an elderly deaconess martyred at Alexandria under the Emperor Decius in the mid 3rd century.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Appollonia Hanss was born in 1615, in Windsberg, Pirmasens, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Nicolaus Hanss, was 30 and her mother, Anna Katharina Speck, was 30. She married Johannes Georg Hüther on 8 January 1644, in Zweibrücken, Bavaria. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 18 August 1709, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 94.

fr.Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saar-Pfalz-Kreis,: Herbitzheim, Gersheim, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Appollonia Hanss est née en 1615, à Windsberg, Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Nicolaus Hanss, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anna Katharina Speck, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Johannes Georg Hüther le 8 janvier 1644, à Zweibrücken, Königreich Bayern. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 août 1709, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Appollonia Hanss 1615 in Windsberg, Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicolaus Hanss 30 und ihre Mutter Anna Katharina Speck 30. Sie hat am 8. Januar 1644 in Zweibrücken, Königreich Bayern Johannes Georg Hüther geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. August 1709 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Pfalz, Bayern, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Appollonia Hanss è nata il nel 1615 nel Windsberg, Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, sua padre, Nicolaus Hanss, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Anna Katharina Speck, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Johannes Georg Hüther il 8 gennaio 1644, nel Zweibrücken, Königreich Bayern. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 agosto 1709, nel Pfalz, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Appollonia Hanssが1615年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズピルマセンスウィンドスバーグで生まれた時，父Nicolaus Hanssは30歳，母Anna Katharina Speckは30歳であった。1644年1月8日にクoニグレイチ バイエルンズウエイブルuクンでJohannes Georg Hütherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1709年8月18日にドイツバイエルンプファルズで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Appollonia Hanss(이)가 1615년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 피마센스 윈드스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicolaus Hanss(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Katharina Speck(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1644년 1월 8일 ko니그레이치 베이른 즈위브uc켄에서 Johannes Georg Hüther(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1709년 8월 18일 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Appollonia Hanss nasceu em 1615, em Windsberg, Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Nicolaus Hanss, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anna Katharina Speck, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Johannes Georg Hüther em 8 de janeiro de 1644, em Zweibrücken, Königreich Bayern. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1709, em Pfalz, Bayern, Alemanha, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Appollonia Hanss родилась в 1615 г. в местности виндсбирг, пирмеисенс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Nicolaus Hanss было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Katharina Speck, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johannes Georg Hüther 8 января 1644 г. в местности звибрuккен, кoниграич беиирн. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 18 августа 1709 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 94 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Appollonia Hanss nació en 1615, en Windsberg, Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Nicolaus Hanss, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anna Katharina Speck, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Johannes Georg Hüther el 8 de enero de 1644, en Zweibrücken, Königreich Bayern. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1709, en Pfalz, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 94 años.
